name: black-bean-sprouts
description: 黑豆芽 — 医学文档排版 Agent 平台

scripts.build:libs: pnpm --filter @black-bean-sprouts/doc-schema build && pnpm --filter @black-bean-sprouts/agent-runtime build && pnpm --filter @black-bean-sprouts/doc-engine build && pnpm --filter @black-bean-sprouts/xiaolongxia-kernel build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:libs && pnpm --filter @black-bean-sprouts/doc-schema run _typecheck && pnpm --filter @black-bean-sprouts/agent-runtime run _typecheck && pnpm --filter @black-bean-sprouts/doc-engine run _typecheck && pnpm --filter @black-bean-sprouts/web run _typecheck && pnpm --filter @black-bean-sprouts/xiaolongxia-kernel run _typecheck && pnpm --filter @black-bean-sprouts/server run _typecheck
